reason: Hard rules: no raw hex (use hsl(var(--token))), library whitelist, toolUI registry for tool-call rendering, AlertDialog for destructive actions. R1/R3-R6 all touch these.
R1 must extend this token system (--brand-deep / --brand-light / --success / --warning / --error / --info). Existing severity palette + light theme rules MUST be preserved.
R3-R6 add new components (MagicUI, Tremor Raw, AgentThoughtChain). Must follow existing MessageBubble/tool-call patterns + destructive AlertDialog convention.

PRD adds @xyflow/react (package rename of react-flow — verify) and Tremor Raw chart components. Spec currently whitelists ONLY react-flow + recharts; Tremor Raw needs §1 amendment. Confirm with implementer before chart copy lands.
Navigational hub for view hierarchy + assistant-ui integration. R4/R5 touch SecbotShell + main App shell — must align with documented surfaces.

R6 AgentThoughtChain introduces a new 'thought' part type for orchestrator reasoning streaming. Wire-format MUST match the WS event contract; if a new event is needed, this spec is the source of truth.
R3 copies 17 source files (MagicUI + Tremor Raw + shadcn blocks). Use this guide to identify shared utilities (cn helper, framer-motion variants) before duplicating.

Recipe B rationale (shadcn blocks + Tremor Raw + MagicUI + xyflow). Per-library deep-dive + risks + theming notes (e.g., MagicUI hardcoded hex sweep, xyflow CSS isolation). The blueprint for PR2/PR3/PR4.

PR0 SecbotThread.tsx v0.10 API fix. Correct signature: ThreadPrimitive.Root + MessagePrimitive.Content components.tools.by_name. Skill registration mechanism + framer-motion AnimatePresence interactions.
Why @prompt-or-die/tech-ui was abandoned (v0.0.1, dormant, TW v4 incompatible, hardcoded #ff5800). Prevents future re-evaluation churn.
